title: AN ACT DECLARING NOVEMBER 15 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF OCCIDENTAL MINDORO IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS FOUNDING ANNIVERSARY

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, November 19, 2018

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11123, October 30, 2018 ]

AN ACT DECLARING NOVEMBER 15 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF OCCIDENTAL MINDORO IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS FOUNDING ANNIVERSARY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. November 15 of every year is hereby declared a special nonworking holiday in the Province of Occidental Mindoro in commemoration of its anniversary.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on July 26, 2017 and September 3, 2018, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: OCT 30 2018

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
